steps.t: Nendath can be found just south-east of Tadrent, along the foothills of the Emyn Ernil. You should hike up to Nendath and scout the valley for Corsair…
Find a good spot on Nendath to <rgb=#FF0000>look</rgb> at the Corsair camp Makham Mijann.
Bruidis can be found back in Tadrent. Talk to Bruidis and tell her what you have seen. She will help you form a plan of action against the Corsairs at…
